TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qsliq, title = qsliq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qsliq} }

S.FORM: qsliq 1. wal saku kbrsun na squliq qu pila maku, mayma saku ini qbaq musa mtzyaw ryax, yaqix bala qsliq.
qsliq 1. wal saku kbrsun na squliq qu pila maku, mayma saku ini qbaq musa mtzyaw ryax, yaqix bala qsliq.
S.PHON: qs~ɕliq *. wal s~ɕaku kβrs~ɕun na s~ɕquliq qu pila maku, majma s~ɕaku ini qβaq mus~ɕa mtzjaw rjax, jaqix βala qs~ɕliq.
